tableRow.maxContractTerm: Minimum 3 years (if feasible), maximum 5 years (4 AAC 27.086(a)(2); statutory 3-year floor at AS 14.09.010(b)). Districts with ADM >= 4,500 must align to a common 5-year bid cycle (4 AAC 27.086(e)).
tableRow.rebidRequired: Required. All pupil-transportation contracts must be based on the competitive proposal process; next RFP must commence 6 months before current contract's expiration (4 AAC 27.086(a), (c)). No carve-out from 4 AAC 27.086.
tableRow.renewalMechanics: N/A. 4 AAC 27 contains no rollover/evergreen/mutual-extension/automatic-renewal/board-extension provision; fresh RFP required at expiration. In-term price flexibility (fuel adjustments; itemized activity-bus pricing) permitted under 4 AAC 27.086(a)(7), (b)(2)-(3). 4 AAC 03.091 waiver exists but cannot waive regulations required by state/federal law or necessary for health and safety.
tableRow.districtVariance: Yes. Three large-district 10-year awards publicly reported on their face exceed the 5-year regulatory ceiling: KPBSD/Apple Bus (effective July 1, 2017); FNSB/Durham (Aug 1, 2021 - June 30, 2031); Mat-Su/Durham (July 1, 2022 - June 30, 2032).
